title: Wire the checked-in Swift sources, plist, entitlements, and KeyboardShortcuts package
description: Add the existing files under app/Samantha to the app target, set the Info.plist and entitlement paths correctly, and add the KeyboardShortcuts package the source already expects. Do not add extra packages unless the build proves they are required.
acceptance_criteria: There are no missing Swift file references, the target uses the checked-in plist and entitlements, and KeyboardShortcuts resolves cleanly in Xcode.

title: Fix and verify WebSocket lifecycle and backend handshake behavior
description: Validate the local WebSocket path against the Python backend. In particular, fix the current false-connected behavior in WebSocketClient so the UI does not report connected immediately after resume(), then verify connect, get_state, disconnect, and reconnect behavior against ws://localhost:9090.
acceptance_criteria: The app only reports connected after a real successful connection path, get_state is sent on connect/reconnect, disconnect is handled cleanly, and the UI does not enter a false-connected state when the backend is unavailable.

title: Verify the audio capture and playback loop and tighten AudioManager teardown behavior
description: Bring up the AVAudioEngine path on macOS, confirm microphone permission, PCM16 capture, playback, and interrupt behavior against the backend, and split stopInputCapture() from full-engine teardown if the current implementation causes playback churn or added latency.
acceptance_criteria: Microphone capture works end to end, assistant audio plays back, manual interrupt clears playback promptly, and AudioManager does not introduce avoidable engine churn in the verified path.

title: Validate frontmost_app_context and capture_display on real macOS permissions
description: Exercise DesktopContextToolExecutor on macOS, including Apple Events permission for Safari/Chrome/Finder metadata and screen-recording permission for capture_display. Verify actual runtime payloads rather than assuming the current source works.
acceptance_criteria: frontmost_app_context returns app/window metadata and a URL or Finder path in at least one supported app, capture_display returns a real screenshot after TCC approval, and any permission/runtime edge cases are documented with evidence.

title: Run the first Mac session checklist end to end and record findings
description: Execute docs/first-mac-session.md as written once the app compiles. Record pass/fail evidence for orb launch, websocket connection, mic capture, assistant playback, interrupt handling, frontmost_app_context, and capture_display.
acceptance_criteria: There is a concrete first-session result with command/build evidence and a pass/fail status for each checklist item. Any gaps found during the run are turned into linked Beads issues instead of being left as undocumented TODOs.

title: Create the Xcode project, app target, and smoke test target
description: Create Samantha.xcodeproj (or workspace if needed) for a macOS 14+ SwiftUI app, add the main app target, and add an initial SamanthaTests target. Use the checked-in app/Samantha source tree, app/Samantha/Info.plist, and app/Samantha/Samantha.entitlements rather than creating parallel copies inside Xcode.
acceptance_criteria: A buildable Xcode project file exists in the repo. The app target references the checked-in source files and settings files. A test target exists and can host at least one smoke test.

title: Bring up the first macOS Samantha app session
description: Create a buildable first macOS app shell from the checked-in Swift sources. Scope is limited to the first real Xcode bring-up: project creation, source wiring, websocket connection, audio loop, native desktop-context tools, and an evidence-backed first runtime validation.
acceptance_criteria: A checked-in Xcode project/workspace and task tree exist for the first Mac session. The path to a buildable shell is broken into explicit dependencies covering bootstrap, websocket, audio, context tools, and runtime verification.

title: Clean app docs and backlog after the first Mac run
description: After the first verified Mac run, update README/AGENTS/docs with the real Xcode/build commands, verified permissions behavior, and any corrected file/project structure. Create follow-up Beads only for proven gaps such as BackendManager, bundling, or deeper computer-use permissions.
acceptance_criteria: Repo docs match the real build/run path and no doc claims an unverified macOS behavior as complete. Follow-up work is tracked in Beads with clear dependency links.
